_comment: Tool catalog exposed to the model. Schemas are validated at load; admin overrides are hot-validated. Changes here require a schemaVersion bump and a changelog entry (docs/DEV.md coding rule 7). tier ∈ chat|query|act. Each tool MUST state an output bound.

tools.name: get_factory_overview
tools.description: Aggregated factory summary (clusters, balance, power). Always fits in context (~1-2k tokens).

tools.name: inspect_cluster
tools.description: Drill into one cluster's machines and flows.
tools.outputBound: machines paginated, 50 per page with 'N more' hint

tools.name: get_item_balance
tools.description: Net production/consumption per item across the factory, with deficit flags.
tools.outputBound: one row per item; truncated to top 100 by |net|

item.description: Optional item class/name; omit for all.

tools.name: find_bottleneck
tools.description: Trace the limiting stage for an item's production chain.

tools.name: add_note
tools.description: Persist a location-tagged annotation, attributed to the requesting player.

position.description: Optional humanized position; defaults to player location.
